_template_tip: Have at least 7 versions вЂ” one per day of the week. Each should say the same thing but with different wording so Facebook doesn't flag it as duplicate content.
groups: в•ђв•ђ PASTE YOUR FACEBOOK GROUP URLS BELOW в•ђв•ђ
в•ђв•ђ One URL per line, inside the quotes   в•ђв•ђ

schedule._note: 50 groups Г· 7 days = ~7 groups per day. Each group gets posted to once per week on a rotating basis.
